isSuccess.title: Success
isSuccess.description: TRUE = Visit log created successfully. FALSE = Something went wrong. CHECK THIS FIRST. If FALSE, read Message for error details. Task failures do NOT set this to FALSE (non-critical). NEXT STEP if TRUE: "Visit logged successfully!" NEXT STEP if FALSE: Show error message to user.

message.title: Message
message.description: EXPLANATION: What happened in plain language. READ IF Success=FALSE: Shows what went wrong like "Account not found: Apollo Hospitals" or "Invalid Account ID format". READ IF Success=TRUE: Informational summary like "Post visit log created successfully with task". HOW TO USE: Show to user if there was an error, log for audit if success. EXAMPLES: "Account ID or Account Name required", "Account not found: Apollo".

postVisitLogId.title: Post Visit Log ID
postVisitLogId.description: UNIQUE ID: Salesforce record ID like "a0a1234567890AB". WHEN POPULATED: Always present when Success=TRUE, empty when Success=FALSE. HOW TO USE: Share with user so they can view the visit record. FORMAT: Copy and include in response like "Visit log created: [ID]". PRIMARY RECORD: This is the main record created.

taskId.title: Task ID
taskId.description: UNIQUE ID: Salesforce task record ID like "00T1234567890AB". WHEN POPULATED: Only if createTask=TRUE and task created successfully. Empty if task not requested. HOW TO USE: Share with user so they know task was created. FORMAT: "Follow-up task created: [ID]". OPTIONAL FIELD: Will be empty if no task was requested.
